title: Registry dashboard and package docs foundation
description:
Closed **2026-04-24** on superrepo [`f57377a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f57377a) (v0.2 delivery tip).

Registry dashboard, public package pages, package source explorer with BlazorMonaco preview, registry activity log, registry-assigned semver on publish, and unified Fluent data-grid row actions.

Workstreams: `pckg-registry`. **10** catalog tasks anchor this deliverable (`milestoneId: v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance
- [`067d53a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/067d53a) (`pckg`) — fix(pckg): show grid action overflow row without VisibleOnLoad trap
- [`adff57b`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/adff57b) (`pckg`) — feat: add moderation safeguards and public package pages
- [`52dc7c9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/52dc7c9) (`pckg`) — pckg: package source explorer, docs/structured API, BlazorMonaco preview, artifact explorer
- [`f47efb7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/f47efb7) (`pckg`) — feat(admin): registry activity log, publish observability
- [`71c5ec1`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/71c5ec1) (`pckg`) — pckg: unify docs as PackageDocs, remove markdown browser and dialog
- [`d003507`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/d003507) (`pckg`) — feat(docs): package docs browser, API, and Fluent UI polish
- [`126e8ca`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/126e8ca) (`compiler`) — feat(pckg): publish UX, streamed upload, API success hardening
- [`459e018`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/459e018) (`compiler`) — feat(pckg): upload publishes with registry-assigned semver
- *…and 2 more seed tasks with provenance commits.*

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.2 (Analysis, packages, and platform spec)
- **Deliverable:** `v02-pckg-registry-foundation` — Registry dashboard and package docs foundation

## Relation
